text:
Market today: Mixed/cautious tone. Dollar strength (headline #2) is a quiet headwind for big tech — strong dollar compresses overseas earnings, and that hits chip names like AVGO hard. The OpenAI IPO delay story (#6) is adding uncertainty to the broader tech narrative, which is exactly where your book lives.

Your holdings: PLTR is your loudest problem — down 17.56% and on a SELL signal; on margin that hole gets expensive fast. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.18% with a TRIM signal — size plus loss plus margin is a dangerous combo. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with almost no price history; tiny moves can swing big, especially on margin.

Watch: (1) Dollar index — if it keeps climbing, your tech/chip names face more pressure. (2) AVGO price action around the $336 stop — largest position, a break there could cascade.

Bottom line: Your two biggest fires are PLTR (act on the SELL) and AVGO (trim the size before the market decides for you).
